overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring overgrown urban decay, massive concrete structures, abandoned vehicles, and distant neon city lights under a stormy overcast sky. The camera moves steadily from a covered walkway through a gate into open plazas and along cliff faces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered path toward a metal gate structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass with green trim dominating the upper frame
tall cylindrical industrial tower with construction cranes visible behind it
green illuminated vending machine with orange accents
large metal security gate with vertical bars blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive industrial overpass structure with concrete pillars lining the right side. The camera moves forward along a concrete path toward a metal security gate, with a green vending machine visible on the right and a tall industrial tower in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with city views

events.description: passes through the metal gate from covered walkway into open plaza

agents.ego_description: passing through the gate and continuing across the open plaza toward the city view

entered.detail: distant futuristic cityscape with tall buildings and neon lights visible through the haze
vertical cyan light beam shooting into the sky from the downtown area
derelict cars scattered along the right side of the plaza
large natural rock formation with orange-brown strata beginning to appear on the right

segments.scene_description: After passing through the metal gate, the scene opens into a wide industrial plaza with full sky visibility. The distant city skyline becomes visible with a prominent cyan neon beam, while the overpass structure recedes to the left. Abandoned vehicles line the right side as a large rock cliff face comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lot between industrial buildings and rock face

events.description: camera turns right to follow the path along the rock cliff face

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the path beside the rock face, navigating around abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: derelict yellow sports car with broken windows parked near the cliff
large industrial structure built into or overhanging the rock face with orange structural elements
building entrance with glowing red warning lights visible in the distance along the cliff

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and proceeds along a path between abandoned vehicles and the massive rock cliff face. The city skyline exits view as the focus shifts to the industrial structures built into the rock, with a building entrance featuring red lights becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area under rock overhang approaching building entrance

events.description: moving under the rock overhang causes lighting to become darker and more shadowed

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance with red lights, walking under the rock overhang

entered.detail: derelict blue sedan parked on the left side of the path
metal and concrete overhang structure providing cover on the left side
tall metal scaffolding or industrial elevator structure against the rock face

segments.scene_description: Walking under the rock overhang, the camera approaches a building entrance marked by red warning lights. The environment becomes more enclosed with industrial scaffolding visible against the cliff, and abandoned vehicles pass by on the left as the path narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown path between cliff and industrial ruin

events.description: passing the building entrance and entering darker overgrown corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing past the building entrance into a darker, overgrown path with dense vegetation

entered.detail: tall dry grass and bushes encroaching on the path from all sides
derelict green vehicle partially buried in vegetation on the left
narrow trail with dirt and overgrown grass replacing the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Passing the building entrance, the scene transitions into a narrow, dark corridor between the rock cliff and industrial ruins. The path becomes a dirt trail with dense overgrown vegetation, and the lighting drops significantly as the camera moves deeper into the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial overpass into an expansive plaza before descending into a dark, overgrown canyon. It begins by moving along a concrete path beneath massive pillars and past a green vending machine toward a metal security gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the overpass recedes and a distant city skyline with a cyan neon beam emerges against the open sky. The camera then turns right, leaving the skyline behind to follow a path between abandoned vehicles and a towering rock cliff, eventually approaching a building entrance marked by red warning lights. Finally, the environment narrows as the camera moves under a rock overhang and into a dark, enclosed corridor where the concrete gives way to a dirt trail and dense overgrown vegetation.
